title: Estimate Your Roof Cost
description: Get an instant, localized roofing estimate based on recent market data.
tearoffDesc: Recommended if you already have 2 layers of shingles.
geoDefaultWarning: Using national average rates. Local rates may vary.
pageSubtitle: Discover true roofing costs in your area. Enter your ZIP code and roof details for an instant, math-based estimate without the sales pressure.
ctaDesc: We can connect you with up to 3 local, vetted roofing professionals who will compete for your business and might beat this estimated price.
submitQuoteDesc: Recently got a roof replacement quote? Share it anonymously to help others get accurate estimates.
missingQuoteFields: Please fill all required quote fields.
quoteSubmitSuccess: Thank you for sharing your quote data!
quoteSubmitThanksDesc: Your anonymous data helps keeping our calculator accurate for everyone.
areaDesc: Average US roof is approx 1,700 - 2,000 sq ft.
